/usr/bin/c++  -Wno-unused-result --std=c++17 CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/print_config.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/quad2xml.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/tree2xml.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/xml2tree.cc.o ../../lib/quad/CMakeFiles/quad.dir/quad.cc.o ../../lib/quad/CMakeFiles/quad.dir/tree2quad.cc.o ../../lib/ir/CMakeFiles/ir.dir/canon.cc.o ../../lib/ir/CMakeFiles/ir.dir/treep.cc.o ../../vendor/tinyxml2/CMakeFiles/vendor_xml.dir/tinyxml2.cc.o -o main
